desc: Debug command for testing ceiling void height calculations.
summary: Debug command for testing ceiling void height calculations. Picks a point and displays all related measurements: room detection via DetectRoomFromServiceStartPoint, ceiling via DetectCeilingHeightFromRoom, slab via DetectSlabAboveHeight, void depth via CalculateVoidHeightFromCeilingAndSlab, centre-of-void via CalculateMiddleOfVoid, and 3D raycast via RayTrace3D.
usecase: User wants to verify void-height calculations at a specific point.
notfor: Production use. Use CalculateMiddleOfVoid directly for runtime logic.
precondition: Active document must be open with a valid plan or 3D view.
postcondition: Debug results are displayed via CommandFeedback. No model changes.

outputs.name: CenterHeight
outputs.description: Centre-of-void height from floor in mm

preprompts: Analysing void heights at the selected point...
thinkingsteps: Calculating void depth and centre elevation...
successprompts: Void analysis complete — depth {VoidDepth}, centre at {CenterHeight}.
Debug results ready. Void is {VoidDepth} deep.
